name: Gold Mine Cyanide Storage Configuration
description: Create a new facility report in EPA Tier2 Submit for a gold heap leach operation and configure a complex Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS) entry that exists in multiple physical states. First, create a new facility named 'Silverstrike Gold Operations LLC' (NAICS: 212221). Then, add a chemical inventory entry for 'Sodium Cyanide' (CAS: 143-33-9). It is a Pure chemical and an EHS. Check BOTH 'Solid' and 'Liquid' for its physical state. Check the physical hazard 'Corrosive to metal' and health hazards 'Acute toxicity (any route of exposure)', 'Skin corrosion or irritation', and 'Specific target organ toxicity (single or repeated exposure)'. Enter the Maximum Daily Amount as 45000 lbs, Average Daily Amount as 30000 lbs, and Number of Days On-Site as 365. Finally, create TWO separate storage locations for this chemical: Location 1 is for the solid reagent (Storage Type: Bag, Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, Description: 'Reagent Storage Warehouse - Sec 1'). Location 2 is for the liquid solution (Storage Type: Above ground tank, Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, Description: 'Cyanide Mixing Tank Area - Outdoor'). Once complete, save/export the submission file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\silverstrike_cyanide_t2.t2s'.
